name: TARGETPAIRS_BY_FUNCTION
description: Target pairs by functional category. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (f:Functional_of_Target {name: $functional_of_target})<-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)
RETURN DISTINCT tp.name AS target_pair
ORDER BY target_pair
LIMIT 50

examples: Which target pairs contain targets in the Apoptosis_Induction_Target category?
Which target pairs contain targets in the Ion_Channel_Immune_Modulator_Target category?
Which target pairs contain targets in the Immune_Cell_Subset_Marker_Target category?
